text: Elementum  delivered the site with inthe timeline as they requested. Inthe end, the client found a 50% increase in traffic with in days since its launch. They also had an impressive ability to use technologies that the company hasn`t used, which have also proved to be easy to use and reliable
The attention to detail in the UI transitions was phenomenal. Not only did they meet the Figma specs perfectly, but the performance optimizations made a huge difference in our user retention metrics.
Working with this team was a game-changer for our brand. They transformed our 'thinker' ideas into 'doer' results with a modern stack that is scalable and incredibly fast.
